apigateway.stage.canarysetting.CfnAbout: Configuration settings of a canary deployment.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.Deploymen.Description: The ID of the canary deployment.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.PercentTr.Description: The percent (0-100) of traffic diverted to a canary deployment.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.StageVari.Description: Stage variables overridden for a canary release deployment, including new stage variables introduced in the canary. These stage variables are represented as a string-to-string map between stage variable names and their values.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.UseStageC.Description: A Boolean flag to indicate whether the canary deployment uses the stage cache or not.
